title: Tool Trinkets
description: This mod adds trinket slots for minecraft tools that also work with AutoTools!
body:
Tool Trinkets adds [Trinket](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) or [Curio](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) slots to the players inventory, allowing you to store your tools without taking up valuable inventory space.

It also works together with [AutoTools](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft_autotools), which automatically gives you the correct tool for mining a block, so you don't even have to open your Inventory.

![Player Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/IKBcZJza/images/2a00f27d3e29e3523d2a0b9461c717fae70e7d9a.png)
